description: Create a Talon voice module to look up financial metrics from a local CSV database at C:\workspace\data\sp500_financials.csv. Develop a Python file (finance_tool.py) and a Talon file (finance_tool.talon) within C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\finance_tool\. The module must map spoken company names to ticker symbols using these normalization rules: lowercase, remove commas, remove the substrings " inc.", " corp.", " ltd.", and " company", and strip whitespace. Implement a list named 'company_ticker' and an action 'insert_finance_metric(ticker: str, metric: str)' to output values for 'Price', 'Market Cap', and 'Price/Earnings'. The Talon file must define global commands 'company price {user.company_ticker}', 'company valuation {user.company_ticker}', and 'company multiple {user.company_ticker}' to trigger the corresponding metric lookups. Save both files for verification.
